auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back. Enter your details to continue.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start with your work email and a password.
auth.oauthError: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
auth.brandQuote: Ship the boring part once — auth, billing, and teams are already wired in.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetInvalidDesc: This link is missing its reset token. Request a fresh one below.
auth.resetDesc: It must be at least 8 characters long.

security.title: Security Settings
security.deleteWarning: Account deletion is non-reversable. Please proceed with caution.

team.title: Team Settings
team.adminOnlyInvite: You must be a team admin to invite new members.
team.exportDesc: Download everything stored for this team as JSON — every record, ready for portability or GDPR requests.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.emptyDesc: When you perform actions like signing in or updating your account, they'll appear here.
activity.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
activity.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
activity.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Bearer tokens other apps and scripts use to call this app's API.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.nameHint: What will use this key — so you know what breaks when you revoke it.
apiKeys.oneTimeWarning: Copy your API key now — it will not be shown again.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke "{name}"? Anything using it stops working immediately.
apiKeys.emptyDesc: Create a key to let another app or script call this app's API.

admin.title: Admin
admin.onlyDesc: Set SUPERADMIN_EMAIL to your account's email to unlock this page.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.createUserFailed: Failed to create user. Please try again.
errors.createTeamFailed: Failed to create team. Please try again.
errors.forgotSent: If that email has an account, a reset link is on its way.
errors.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.passwordUpdatedSignIn: Password updated. You can sign in with it now.
errors.newPasswordSame: New password must be different from the current password.
errors.newPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation password do not match.
errors.notInTeam: User is not part of a team
errors.adminOnlyRemove: Only team admins can remove members
errors.adminOnlyInvite: Only team admins can invite members
errors.alreadyMember: User is already a member of this team
errors.invitationExists: An invitation has already been sent to this email
errors.aiRateLimited: Too many AI requests — try again in a minute.
errors.aiQuotaExceeded: Your team reached today's AI limit. It resets tomorrow.
errors.aiUnavailable: The AI service is not available right now. Try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: An unexpected error occurred. It's been logged — try again, or head back home.

verifyBanner.message: Verify your email address to secure your account.
verifyBanner.sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Anomalies and suggestions from the daily analysis of your team's data.
insights.emptyDesc: The daily analysis will surface anomalies and suggestions here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.insightsNew: {count, plural, one {# new insight for your team} other {# new insights for your team}}
